findingDetails.title: Renumbered child metadata and docs still advertise old phase numbers
findingDetails.evidence: Current parent map identifies learning feedback reducers as 008 while description metadata still uses old 009 title/triggers and specId 007.
findingDetails.recommendation: Refresh metadata and active references to current folder ids.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Compared parent map and child metadata.

findingDetails.title: Graph metadata marks draft placeholder phases complete
findingDetails.evidence: Phase 003 spec says Draft and implementation summary is a placeholder, while graph metadata says complete.
findingDetails.recommendation: Regenerate graph metadata status from canonical spec/summary state.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Checked phase specs, implementation summaries, and graph metadata for phases 003-006.

title: Renumbered child metadata and docs still advertise old phase numbers
claim: Active metadata and dependency text still use pre-renumbering phase numbers.
recommendation: Refresh active metadata to current ids and keep old numbers only in context-index history.
scopeProof: Parent map and child metadata comparison.

title: Graph metadata marks draft placeholder phases complete
claim: Graph metadata status contradicts canonical spec and implementation-summary state for draft phases.
